channel.title: Workspace on Judy AI Lab
channel.description: Recent content in Workspace on Judy AI Lab

item.title: Google Ships Workspace CLI — Agents No Longer Need Humans to Install Their Plugins
item.description: Google open-sourced Workspace CLI, hitting 4,900 GitHub Stars in three days. This isn’t just about managing Gmail from your terminal — it signals a fundamental shift in how Agent tooling works: from community-built MCP wrappers to vendor-native CLI tools with MCP built in.
